case.title: GULFPORT FARM & PASTURE CO. v. HANCOCK BANK

opinion.h: GULFPORT FARM & PASTURE CO. v. HANCOCK BANK, 358 U.S. 67 (1958)
GULFPORT FARM & PASTURE CO. v. HANCOCK BANK. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MISSISSIPPI. No. 390. Decided November 10, 1958.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
358 U.S. 67 LATHAM v. ECKLE, SUPERINTENDENT, LONDON PRISON FARM. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 190, Misc. Decided November 10, 1958.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE STEWART took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
